sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
pleasantry, humor, facetiousness, scurrility, ribaldry, low jesting

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G2095 and a derivative of the base of G5157 (meaning well turned, that is, ready at repartee, jocose); witticism, that is, (in a vulgar sense) ribaldry: - jesting.
